zh.lifeSummary: 當Albrecht II "der Große" Herzog von Mecklenburg-Schwerin於1318年出生在德國梅可倫波-沃爾包莫史維林史維林時，他的父親Heinrich II "der Löwe" von Mecklenburg52歲，母親Anna von Sachsen Wittenberg36歲。他和Eufemia Eriksdotter至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1379年2月18日在他的家鄉享年61歲，埋葬在德國福萊斯塔阿特 梅可倫波-史維林斯塔特 多朗。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Albrecht II "der Große" Herzog von Mecklenburg-Schwerin于1318年出生在德国梅可倫波-沃爾包莫史維林史維林时，他的父亲Heinrich II "der Löwe" von Mecklenburg52岁，母亲Anna von Sachsen Wittenberg36岁。他和Eufemia Eriksdotter至少有5个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1379年2月18日在他的家乡享年61岁，埋葬在德国福萊斯塔阿特 梅可倫波-史維林斯塔特 多朗。

nameMeanings.name: "der
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

nameMeanings.name: Große"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cornish: topographic name for someone who lived near a stone cross set up by the roadside or in a marketplace, Cornish crous (from Latin crux, crucis). Compare Cross .
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Gross  .

variants.name: Cross
meanings: Either an adoption of the Gaelic topographic term ros ‘headland’ ( compare Glen , Kyle ) or a transferred use of the Scottish surname, which is borne by a large and ancient family whose members have played a major role in Scottish history. Although still very popular in Scotland, the name is now in widespread general use.

en.lifeSummary: When Albrecht II "der Große" Herzog von Mecklenburg-Schwerin was born in 1318, in Schwerin, Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germany, his father, Heinrich II "der Löwe" von Mecklenburg, was 52 and his mother, Anna von Sachsen Wittenberg, was 36. He had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Eufemia Eriksdotter. He died on 18 February 1379, in his hometown, at the age of 61, and was buried in Doberan, Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Albrecht II "der Große" Herzog von Mecklenburg-Schwerin est né en 1318, à Schwerin, Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Allemagne, son père, Heinrich II "der Löwe" von Mecklenburg, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Anna von Sachsen Wittenberg, avait 36 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Eufemia Eriksdotter. Il est décédé le 18 février 1379, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Stadt Doberan, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Albrecht II "der Große" Herzog von Mecklenburg-Schwerin 1318 in Schwerin, Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Heinrich II "der Löwe" von Mecklenburg 52 und seine Mutter Anna von Sachsen Wittenberg 36. Er hatte mit Eufemia Eriksdotter mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 18. Februar 1379 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Stadt Doberan, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Albrecht II "der Große" Herzog von Mecklenburg-Schwerin è nato il nel 1318 nel Schwerin, Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germania, il suo padre, Heinrich II "der Löwe" von Mecklenburg, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Anna von Sachsen Wittenberg, aveva 36 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Eufemia Eriksdotter. Morì il 18 febbraio 1379, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Stadt Doberan, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Albrecht II "der Große" Herzog von Mecklenburg-Schwerinが1318年にドイツメックレンブルグ-ボルプオンメルンスチウエリンスチウエリンで生まれた時，父Heinrich II "der Löwe" von Mecklenburgは52歳，母Anna von Sachsen Wittenbergは36歳であった。彼はEufemia Eriksdotterとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1379年2月18日に故郷で61歳で死去し，ドイツフレイスタアト メックレンブルグ-スチウエリンスタト ドバーアンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Albrecht II "der Große" Herzog von Mecklenburg-Schwerin(이)가 1318년 독일 클렌버그-보르폼머 슈워인 슈워인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Heinrich II "der Löwe" von Mecklenburg(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna von Sachsen Wittenberg(은)는 36세였다. 그는 Eufemia Eriksdotter(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1379년 2월 18일 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 프레이스타앳 클렌버그-슈워인 스타드트 도베란에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Albrecht II "der Große" Herzog von Mecklenburg-Schwerin nasceu em 1318, em Schwerin, Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemanha, seu pai, Heinrich II "der Löwe" von Mecklenburg, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Anna von Sachsen Wittenberg, tinha 36 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Eufemia Eriksdotter. Ele faleceu em 18 de fevereiro de 1379, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Stadt Doberan, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Albrecht II "der Große" Herzog von Mecklenburg-Schwerin родился в 1318 г. в местности щвирин, щвирин, меккленбург-ворпоммирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Heinrich II "der Löwe" von Mecklenburg было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Anna von Sachsen Wittenberg, 36. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Eufemia Eriksdotter. Он умер 18 февраля 1379 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности стадт добиран, фристаат меккленбург-щвирин, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Albrecht II "der Große" Herzog von Mecklenburg-Schwerin nació en 1318, en Schwerin, Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemania, su papá, Heinrich II "der Löwe" von Mecklenburg, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Anna von Sachsen Wittenberg, tenía 36 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas con Eufemia Eriksdotter. Murió el 18 de febrero de 1379, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Stadt Doberan, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Alemania.
